brief_summary_anonymized: Tax authority needs Ramadan campaign for digital Zakat platform — challenge is bridging spiritual act with digital intermediary.
strategic_insight: People trust the spiritual act of Zakat; they don't yet trust the digital intermediary. The brand's job is to make the digital feel as human as the traditional.
execution_summary: Show the human ritual (Zakat paid via traditional means in family scene) → seamlessly bridge to digital ritual (app, same calm). The technology serves the act, doesn't replace it.
what_made_it_work: Bridging analog ritual + digital trust requires careful visual sequencing
Religious-occasion register requires reverence; never trivializing
what_would_NOT_transplant: Religious-context content requires deep cultural sensitivity
Sector applies only to officially-cleared religious-act facilitators
